untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit earnings announcement detection (calendar event data) and implied volatility metrics (IV levels, IV rank, straddle pricing). The available indicators do not include: (1) earnings calendar/event flags, (2) implied volatility or IV percentile/rank, (3) options Greeks (delta, gamma, vega), (4) straddle-specific pricing or premium levels. Historical volatility (hvol_20) is a proxy but does not capture the pre-earnings IV expansion and post-earnings IV collapse dynamics that are central to this strategy. A proper implementation requires external earnings data and live options pricing.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using hvol_20 as a volatility regime indicator, but this fundamentally misses the signal's core mechanism: selling high implied volatility before earnings and benefiting from the post-earnings IV crush. Without earnings event detection and implied volatility data, this strategy cannot be accurately backtested using only price-action indicators.
